title: I did my first PR on vllm-metal and I was able to run tests with up to 32K context on M3 Ultra with Qwen3-0.6B. mlx-lm is still the winner and TTFT is not the correct one there, improvement is WIP. Mega heatmap andPrefill/Decode charts updated. ctx rows leverages caching.
